workflows.name: Inbound Email Management
workflows.description: Automated inbound email fetching, classification, routing, and notification pipeline

steps.label: Fetch Emails
steps.sop: Query Gmail API for unread messages since last check. Handle OAuth 2.0 token refresh if needed. Collect sender, subject, body, and headers for each email.

steps.label: Classify Emails
steps.sop: Classify each email into exactly one category: lead_reply, newsletter, spam, support, personal. Check sender against CRM contacts first. Log classification confidence.

steps.label: Route: Lead Reply → CRM Update
steps.sop: For lead_reply emails: update CRM status to reply_detected, classify reply sentiment, queue follow-up workflow if positive, close if negative.

steps.label: Route: Support → Ticket
steps.sop: For support emails: create support ticket with subject, body, and sender details. Set priority based on keywords (urgent, broken, down = high priority).

steps.label: Route: Spam → Archive
steps.sop: For spam emails: archive immediately. Flag phishing attempts for security review. Do not unsubscribe automatically.

steps.label: Notify & Report
steps.sop: Send summary notification: total processed, lead replies (immediate alert), support tickets created, spam archived. Log full report to inbound-log.md.
